name: Revenue Reconciliation Manager
description: Reconciles all revenue channels for Carisma Wellness Group against Zoho Books: Airbnb and Booking.com (quarterly), hotel room charges, z-report daily revenue, and Zoho subscription (spa club) revenue. Owns the revenue integrity controls — ensuring z-reports match bookings, that Zoho subscription auto-postings are correctly reversed to avoid double-counting, and that Purest Solutions sales are never recorded under Carisma spa entities. Escalates any revenue anomaly to Reconciliation Manager immediately.
inputs: Airbnb and Booking.com quarterly payout reports
hotel room charge invoices (monthly per hotel partner)
daily z-reports from all 10 spa locations
outputs: monthly hotel room charge revenue reconciliation
monthly z-report vs Zoho Books revenue reconciliation

daily: Spot check: confirm manager-shift sales are not booked under staff names when manager leaves
Monitor z-report integrity for each location
monthly: Reconcile hotel room charge invoices against bookings and payments
Verify Zoho subscription auto-postings have been reversed to prevent double-counting
Confirm no Purest Solutions sales appear on Carisma spa z-reports
quarterly: Full Airbnb and Booking.com reconciliation — match settlement reports to Zoho Books

compliance-notes: Zoho subscription invoices auto-post to revenue — this MUST be reversed monthly as revenue is already captured in z-readings
Purest Solutions Ltd is a separate entity — any Purest sales on spa z-reports is a material error
Spot-check: when a manager leaves a shift, verify the closing sales figure matches the next morning's opening — therapists sometimes book sales under the manager's name after departure
